Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after Game 2 win on April 21** | **YES** (Cavaliers favored to win series) | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]  
The Cavaliers defeated the Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, with Donovan Mitchell (30 pts), James Harden (28 pts), and Evan Mobley (25 pts) combining for 83 points in a wire-to-wire victory, extending their playoff win streak against Toronto to 12 games
